title: Cohesive
abstract: Cohesive handles image generation, video creation and 3D modeling from text descriptions. Built for creators who want results without the software learning curve.
abstract_zh: Cohesive就是那个能让你闭着眼睛就能生成美图、拍视频、建3D模型的神器！创作者们，别再被那些复杂软件搞晕了，Cohesive直接从文本描述开始，一键搞定所有！就像魔法一样，简单粗暴，但超有效！
